property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.application\.command;.*import uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.core\.domain\.(definitions\.EntityDefinition|instances\.(EntityInstance|EntityInstanceDraft));

property.name: message
property.value: Application command DTOs must carry stable names and values, not mutable schema definitions or live entity instances.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.adapter\.http\.apihandlers\.route;.*import uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.core\.domain\.definitions\.(EntityDefinition|field\.definition\.Field);

property.name: message
property.value: Typed route classes must carry schema refs or stable names, not mutable schema definitions or fields.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.adapter\.http\.apihandlers;.*(\.entityQueries\s*\(|\.findByField\s*\(|\.findByGuid\s*\(|\.findByQueryIdentifier\s*\()

property.name: message
property.value: API HTTP mappers must not resolve instances through repositories; application services own store lookups.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.application(\.|;).*(\b(GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH|HEAD)\b|\bPutThingCommand\b|\bvalidatePut[A-Za-z0-9_]*\b)

property.name: message
property.value: Application production code must use semantic command vocabulary, not HTTP verb names.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.application(\.|;).*\b(statusCode|ApiResponse|HttpApiRequest|HttpApiResponse|HttpHeaders|Header)\b

property.name: message
property.value: Application production code must return semantic errors; HTTP statuses, responses, requests, and headers belong at the adapter boundary.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.application\.command;.*\b(routeDisplay|getRouteDisplay|originalPath)\b

property.name: message
property.value: Application command DTOs must carry semantic identifiers, not adapter route-display strings.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.application(\.|;).*\b(routeDisplay|getRouteDisplay|originalPath|Could not find parent thing for relationship|Could not find any instances with)\b

property.name: message
property.value: Route-display and legacy path-shaped error text belong in the HTTP adapter, not application production code.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.core(\.|;).*\b(UrlParamParser|core\.query\.fromurl|URLDecoder|urlDecode|rawUrlParams)\b

property.name: message
property.value: Core query code must receive QueryFilterParams; URL query-string parsing belongs at the HTTP/API edge.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)class ThingCommandService\b.*(private\s+ThingCommandResult\s+(create|amend|replace|delete|connectExistingRelationship|createAndConnect|relate|disconnectRelationship|connectRelationship|connectRelationshipReferences|connectRelationships)\s*\(|private\s+(EntityInstanceDraft|EntityInstance|RelationshipVectorDefinition|boolean|void)\s+(createDraft|resolveInstance|relationshipErrorIfInvalid|firstRelationshipVector|bodyReferencesExistingRelatedItem|relatedInstanceMatchingIdentifier|matchesQueryIdentifier|disconnectConnections|copyBaseDraftValues)\s*\(|private\s+static\s+final\s+class\s+(RelatedItemResolution|RelationshipSnapshot|RelationshipLink)\b)

property.name: message
property.value: ThingCommandService should stay a thin transaction-wrapped dispatcher; moved use-case helpers belong in focused collaborators.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.application\.schema\.definition;.*import uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.core\.domain\.definitions\.(Cardinality|DefinedFields|EntityDefinition|field\.definition\.Field|relationship\.(RelationshipDefinition|RelationshipVectorDefinition));

property.name: message
property.value: Schema definition specs must stay YAML-agnostic and runtime-schema neutral; only the assembler/exporter boundary may touch mutable schema objects.

property.name: format
property.value: (?s)package uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.core(\.|;).*import uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.(yaml|application\.schema\.definition)\.

property.name: message
property.value: Core must not depend on YAML adapters or schema import-definition adapter types.

property.name: format
property.value: ^import org\.yaml\.snakeyaml\.

property.name: message
property.value: SnakeYAML imports belong only in the optional thingifier-yaml adapter module.

property.name: format
property.value: ^import uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.yaml\.

property.name: message
property.value: YAML adapter DTOs and API types must not leak into thingifier or ercoremodel.

property.name: format
property.value: ^import spark\.

property.name: message
property.value: Spark imports belong at the Spark adapter edge or an explicit bootstrap/legacy route suppression.

property.name: format
property.value: ^import uk\.co\.compendiumdev\.thingifier\.api\.http\.bodyparser\.BodyParser;

property.name: message
property.value: BodyParser is an HTTP-edge compatibility type; mappers and application services should consume ApiBodyFields or commands.

property.name: message
property.value: URL grammar belongs in ThingRouteMapper; core and API mappers must not reintroduce URL route helper parsers.

property.name: message
property.value: API mappers must depend on narrow runtime ports, not the full Thingifier object.

property.name: message
property.value: Do not hide store/draft access behind broad test-support helpers; use EntityInstanceDraft and ThingStore ports directly.

property.name: message
property.value: Shared test support classes must not hide repository writes or mutable EntityInstance internals.

property.name: message
property.value: EntityInstanceDraft should describe changes only; materialize snapshots through MutableEntityInstance inside repository code or tests.

property.name: message
property.value: EntityInstanceRepositoryAccess is removed; use MutableEntityInstance in repository code or ThingStore ports.

property.name: message
property.value: EntityInstance is a read-only snapshot; create persisted instances through ThingStore entity ports or repository-owned MutableEntityInstance.

property.name: message
property.value: EntityInstance.repositorySnapshot is a narrow materialization hook used only by MutableEntityInstance.

property.name: message
property.value: MutableEntityInstance is guarded for repository implementations; normal production code should use ThingStore ports.

property.name: message
property.value: Auto ID generation belongs in ThingStore port tests and APIs, not EntityInstance test-only mutation helpers.

property.name: message
property.value: Use repository-native APIs instead of legacy snapshot escape methods.

property.name: message
property.value: Thingifier and Challenger runtime code should use ThingStore ports instead of in-memory entity collections.

property.name: message
property.value: SimpleQuery is removed; use RepositoryQuery or repository APIs.

property.name: message
property.value: Persisted EntityInstance creation must go through EntityInstanceDraft and a ThingStore entity port.

property.name: message
property.value: EntityInstance fields are mutable internals; use read-only field APIs or repository access.

property.name: message
property.value: Relationship state must be repository-owned; use ThingStore relationship ports instead of EntityInstance relationship internals.

property.name: message
property.value: Relationship traversal and materialization must go through ThingStore relationship ports.

property.name: message
property.value: Relationship writes and validation are repository-owned; do not mutate EntityInstance relationships through repository access bridges.

property.name: message
property.value: Public relationship removal must not expose cascade-delete EntityInstance lists; execute cascades inside the repository/store.

property.name: format
property.value: \b(private|protected)\s+[\w<>\[\], ?]+\s+(assertRelationshipCardinalityAllows|validateRelationshipRow|instancesSubjectToMandatoryRelationship|rowRepresentsVectorForInstance|relationshipExistsBetween|countRowsForVector)\s*\(

property.name: message
property.value: Relationship rule decisions belong in repository.relationship.RelationshipRules; repositories should call the shared policy instead of duplicating private helpers.

property.name: message
property.value: The broad ThingRepository API has been split; use ThingStore, ThingStoreProvider, or focused store ports.

property.name: message
property.value: Production code should not add @Deprecated APIs without an explicit static-analysis suppression.
